title: Effector
description: Schema for Effector Ascriptions — output endpoint of a Mechanism. Defines the owning Mechanism and the data Archetype that types the output payload. Interface exposure is owned by the Interface itself (via join tables), not by the Effector. DM input = DM output (1:1). Tenant-defined archetypes extending Effector MUST reference this schema via allOf.

mechanism.description: ID reference to the owning Mechanism. An Effector cannot exist without a Mechanism.

archetype.description: ID reference to the data Archetype that types the Effector's output payload. To change the data type, author a new Definition.
